import asyncio

lock = asyncio.Lock()


async def update_shared_resource(key, value):
    async with lock:
        old_value = await fetch_from_db(key)
        new_value = old_value + value
        await save_to_db(key, new_value)
        return new_value


async def transfer_funds(from_acc, to_acc, amount):
    async with lock:
        balance = await get_balance(from_acc)
        await update_balance(from_acc, balance - amount)
        await update_balance(to_acc, balance + amount)
